query:
-- Show the 5 unlinked bundle items
SELECT externalId, description, lineAmount, customerExternalId, xeroContactName
FROM billing_items 
WHERE description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied%' AND customerExternalId IS NULL
ORDER BY lineAmount DESC;
